libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native-test/runtime system properties for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. The existing 5.0.0 scaffold already applies these only when libraryVersion == '5.0.0'; extend the guard for 5.0.1 or the relevant Vert.x 5.0.x range. No external service is required for core coverage; use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer with WebClient/WebClientSession/CachingWebClient/forms/redirects as applicable.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Optional vertx-auth-oauth2 support is declared optional by the artifact; do not add it unless tests intentionally exercise OAuth2-specific APIs.
Local Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative for whether these runtime properties are sufficient for the reported native-image run failure.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Vert.x Web Client 5.0.1 is self-contained for meaningful in-process HTTP/WebClient coverage, but it still pulls Netty 4.2.x and needs the same Java 25 native runtime unsafe-access properties already used for 5.0.0.
